text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has started, and once again,
Manhattan Cafe seems to be communicating with
someone or something from the beyond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon explains that she's less interested
in the true form of Manhattan Cafe's friend than
in where this friend is trying to lead her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since there are more opportunities to talk during
the summer camp, I figured it might be important
to get a deeper understanding of her friend.
